summary: The change reduces current increment breadth, improves delivery confidence, and requires refresh of planning and stakeholder artifacts.
assumptions: Transcript-to-notes and bi-weekly status mail remain the highest-value PM workflow automations.

artifact_impacts.action_required: Re-slice increment scope and update the committed item list.

workflow_impacts.rationale: This workflow is now explicitly in scope.
Defer broader automation until the next increment.

stakeholder_impacts.impact_summary: Receives a tighter increment with clearer quality boundaries.

risk_register.title: Status mail may miss narrative context if PM inputs are not collected.
risk_register.mitigation: Prompt PM only for missing narrative gaps not inferable from system records.

replan_options.label: Focus current increment on PM operating rhythm
replan_options.summary: Deliver status mail, issue log, agenda, and transcript extraction before broader meeting automation.
